flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-Santa Barbara rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.0k → $13.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Santa Barbara rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $50.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Santa Barbara rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.4k → $16.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Santa Barbara fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
